ExtensionPropertySingleResponse.description: Response returned when retrieving a single extension property.

ExtensionPropertiesGetResponse.description: Response returned when retrieving multiple extension properties. Keys are property names; values are their current string values.

ExtensionPropertiesUpdateResponse.description: Response returned after adding or updating extension properties. Contains only the key-value pairs that were submitted in the request.

longid_regex.description: Numeric long integer identifier used to reference platform components such as Commands, Functions, Widgets, Message Actions, Schedulers, and Extensions.

scope.description:
Installlation scope for the extension.
Allowable values:
  • organization: Extension will be available to all users within the organization. Requires admin consent.
  • team: Extension will be available only to users within specified teams. Requires admin consent for each team.

team_ids.description: List of team_ids to which the extension should be installed. Required if scope is set to team. Maximum of 4 team IDs allowed.

encryptedappkey_regex.description: Encrypted application key (appkey or EXTENSION_KEY) issued to a bot or extension, used as an alternative to OAuth for webhook-style authentication.

extensionupgrade_V3.description: Payload for upgrading an installed extension.

properties.description: Map of extension property keys to values.

smallalphawithspl_regex.description: Lowercase alphanumeric string with allowed special characters (hyphens and underscores) used as extension property keys.
